prompt: Preserve this exact studio worktable scene and its warm honey daylight grade, lived-in working details, and the small blue-and-white floral printed cotton. Real candid photograph of a working dressmaking atelier, 35mm film look, gentle grain, shallow depth of field, authentic imperfection. No text, no logos, no watermarks. Portrait framing. Add: a generous stack of freshly delivered cotton fabric bolts and rolled lengths set behind and beside the worktable, a mix of the floral printed cotton and plain natural/cream cotton, with brown kraft paper and twine half-unwrapped around them as if the delivery just arrived this morning, and one bolt pulled forward onto the table being opened.
